description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, metallic body with a domed chest and broad, rounded shoulders accented by red bands. Its arms and legs are thick and cylindrical, with visible mechanical joints and claw-like feet, suggesting strength and stability. The torso is barrel-shaped, with circular details and a central, slightly raised dome on top, possibly housing a sensor or light. The back displays a rectangular panel and mechanical spine-like elements, emphasizing its industrial design. The surface is a weathered bronze color, giving it a vintage, steampunk-inspired appearance. The robot lacks visible facial features, instead presenting a smooth, armored head integrated into the upper torso.
description: A sturdy, bronze-colored humanoid robot with broad shoulders, cylindrical limbs, and red accents, featuring a domed chest and mechanical joints.
description_view_0: Front view shows the domed chest, broad shoulders with red bands, and claw-like feet; the head is integrated into the torso with a central dome.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cylindrical arms and legs, rounded shoulder, and the thickness of the limbs; minimal surface detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a rectangular panel on the back, mechanical spine-like elements, and the back of the domed torso; red shoulder bands are visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the cylindrical arm and leg, rounded shoulder, and the overall bulk of the robot.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms hanging down and slightly outward, legs straight and feet planted firmly on the ground, torso upright and head integrated into the chest.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated metallic panels with red decorative bands on the shoulders and a central dome.
attribute_facial_features: No visible facial features; the head is a smooth, armored dome integrated into the upper torso with a small central dome possibly functioning as a sensor.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible rotary and hinge joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees; limbs appear rigid but capable of mechanical movement at the joints; feet have articulated claws.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Single dome-like sensor on top of the torso; none others visible.
